process.description: Workflow process name for the task.

submit.description: Timestamp when the task was submitted.

start.description: Timestamp when the task started running.

module.description: Array of module names associated with the task.

container.description: Container image used for the task.

script.description: Executed task script content or path.

scratch.description: Scratch directory used by the task.

queue.description: Executor queue used for the task.

cpus.description: Number of CPUs requested by the task.

memory.description: Amount of memory requested by the task.

disk.description: Amount of disk requested by the task.

executor.description: Nextflow executor used for the task.

machineType.description: Machine or instance type used to run the task.

cloudZone.description: Cloud zone used to run the task.

priceModel.description: Cloud pricing model used for the task.
priceModel.title: CloudPriceModel

errorAction.description: Nextflow error strategy action applied to the task.

exitStatus.description: Process exit status reported by the task runtime.

duration.description: Total recorded task duration in milliseconds.

nativeId.description: Native scheduler or executor job identifier.

pcpu.description: Observed CPU usage percentage for the task.

pmem.description: Observed memory usage percentage for the task.

rss.description: Resident memory usage for the task.

vmem.description: Virtual memory usage for the task.

peakRss.description: Peak resident memory usage for the task.

peakVmem.description: Peak virtual memory usage for the task.

rchar.description: Number of characters read by the task.

wchar.description: Number of characters written by the task.

syscr.description: Number of read-like system calls performed by the task.

syscw.description: Number of write-like system calls performed by the task.

readBytes.description: Number of bytes read from storage by the task.

writeBytes.description: Number of bytes written to storage by the task.

volCtxt.description: Number of voluntary context switches for the task.

invCtxt.description: Number of involuntary context switches for the task.

exit.description: Task exit code recorded by Nextflow.

taskId.description: Task numeric identifier reported by Nextflow.

dateCreated.description: Timestamp when the task record was created.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the task record was last updated.
